/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/lob_client.dir/src/client.cc.o -o lob_client  liblob_core.a /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurses.tbd /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libform.tbd /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd
